MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Lewis Gillian. James Coy Driscoll, Esq. specially appeared for Plaintiff, Information Leasing Corporation. The presence of witness, Susan Young, Vice-President, of Information Leasing Corporation was waived in liew of declaration. The Court ordered the matter off calendar due to defective declaration signed by another person and not Susan Young.
